questions.scenario: A production API token must rotate. Which workflow is safest for a reviewed Ansible repository?

options.text: Edit the encrypted file with the Vault workflow, review variable names and affected tasks, and run with the approved vault password source.
Temporarily commit the plaintext token, run Ansible, then delete it in a later commit.
Paste the token into a debug task so reviewers can confirm the exact value.
Store the token in inventory host aliases because aliases are not rendered to logs.

questions.explanation: Secret rotation should keep plaintext out of Git and logs. Reviewers can check the variable wiring and blast radius without seeing the secret value itself.
